ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (e.g., F, M) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the athlete competes in */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight class the athlete competes in */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used by the athlete */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the athlete */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("weight_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's assistant coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the division */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "weight_class_kg" REAL /* Weight class in kilograms */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight class */,
  "min_weight_kg" REAL /* Minimum weight in kilograms for the weight class */,
  "max_weight_kg" REAL /* Maximum weight in kilograms for the weight class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., SBD, SBDW) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the event */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the event */,
  "deadline_date" TEXT /* Deadline date for registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "bodyweight_kg" REAL /* Body weight of the athlete during the event */,
  "best3_squat_kg" REAL /* Best 3 squat lifts in kilograms */,
  "best3_bench_kg" REAL /* Best 3 bench press lifts in kilograms */,
  "best3_deadlift_kg" REAL /* Best 3 deadlift lifts in kilograms */,
  "total_kg" REAL /* Total weight lifted in kilograms */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Final placing in the event */,
  "attempt1_squat_kg" REAL /* First squat attempt in kilograms */,
  "attempt2_squat_kg" REAL /* Second squat attempt in kilograms */,
  "attempt3_squat_kg" REAL /* Third squat attempt in kilograms */,
  "attempt1_bench_kg" REAL /* First bench press attempt in kilograms */,
  "attempt2_bench_kg" REAL /* Second bench press attempt in kilograms */,
  "attempt3_bench_kg" REAL /* Third bench press attempt in kilograms */,
  "attempt1_deadlift_kg" REAL /* First deadlift attempt in kilograms */,
  "attempt2_deadlift_kg" REAL /* Second deadlift attempt in kilograms */,
  "attempt3_deadlift_kg" REAL /* Third deadlift attempt in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, official, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule entry */,
  "schedule_time" TEXT /* Time of the schedule entry */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the schedule entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedule_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results_archive" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archived result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original result */,
  "archive_date" TEXT /* Date the result was archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_archive_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_archive_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES competition_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_archive_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
